title: M.Sc. Biomedical Science (2 Year)
content: M.Sc. Biomedical Sciences is a 2 year postgraduate course divided into 4 Semesters. Biomedical Sciences is the branch of the science that deals with the study and application of biological sciences and medical sciences. The purpose of the biomedical sciences is designing, developing and discovery of drug. Pharmacology, Medicinal chemistry, Medical microbiology, and Physiology subjects are core subjects and backbone of biomedical sciences but biochemistry, molecular biology and immunology, bioinstrumentation are also necessary to fulfill the purpose of biomedical sciences. Graduation in Botany/ Zoology/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Biomedical Sciences/ Genetics/ Medicine/ Agriculture/ Life Sciences/ Pharmacy from any recognized university or equivalent examination with a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate. Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit. Trained manpower in the area of Biomedical Science are required for Research and Development, in Multinational Companies, Public Sectors, Quality Control Labs, Biopharmaceuticals companies, Food industries as well as in Universities. The present curriculum is designed to cater to these needs. With a degree in Biochemistry, students can get opportunities in various fields like research organizations, pharmaceuticals industries, healthcare organizations, forensic science laboratories, environmental organizations and pursue higher education (M. Phil/ PhD) in institutions in India and abroad. 01 To provide an in-depth understanding of core concepts in Advanced Cytology, Biomolecules, Organic Chemistry, Immunology, and other allied disciplines. 02 To build a strong academic and technical foundation essential for the multidisciplinary field of Biomedical Science. 03 To develop critical thinking, analytical reasoning, and problem-solving abilities relevant to biomedical applications. 04 To impart practical skills and hands-on training through laboratory work, research projects, and industry exposure. 05 To prepare students for diverse career opportunities in biomedical industries, clinical laboratories, healthcare, and research institutions. 06 To encourage a spirit of scientific inquiry and innovation for further research and development in biomedical sciences. 07 To instill ethical values, professional responsibility, and scientific integrity in biomedical research and practice. 08 To equip students with strong communication skills for effective dissemination of scientific knowledge in academic, industrial, and clinical settings. 09 To enable graduates to contribute meaningfully to scientific and technological advancements for human health and well-being. 01 02 03 Modern tool usage: Create, select, and apply appropriate techniques, resources, and modern science and research tools including prediction and modelling to complex scientific activities with an understanding of the limitations. 04 05 06 07 08 01 The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the world of biomedical science concepts through application based learning. 02 The graduates will be emphasized on applied aspects of advance biomedical techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude. 03 The graduates of biomedical science will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing, continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organization. 01 Developing deeper understanding of key concepts of basic and allied branches of Biomedical Sciences such as cellular and animal physiology, Immunology, Genetics, Biotechnology, Medical Microbiology, Pharmacology and Toxicology & Organic and medicinal chemistry. 02 Equip students with analytical and technical skills through application based learning such as use of audio visual aids, problem/project based learning, guest lectures, visits to industrial and academic organizations and to practice evidence based research in the field of Biomedical Science. Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit.
